editors_pick.title: Gen-Z Revival Isn’t Happening. Here’s How It Could.
editors_pick.summary: If a Gen Z revival surges in this country, it’ll be through acknowledging their desire for truth, and helping them see that it can be found most directly through a life lived in community with fellow believers.
editors_pick.author: Zac Fuller
